description_long: This is a tall, rectangular Coca-Cola vending machine with a predominantly red exterior and black base. The front face features a large Coca-Cola logo, a display panel, a payment interface, and a product selection area, all situated in the upper right section. The sides are red with the Coca-Cola logo in white, while the back is plain red with a black lower section. The machine appears to be constructed from metal with a glossy finish, and likely contains internal refrigeration and dispensing mechanisms. The branding is bold and highly visible, making it easily recognizable in urban environments. The machine is designed for public use, offering cold beverages through a secure, interactive interface.
description: A tall, rectangular Coca-Cola vending machine with a red and black exterior, prominent branding, and interactive panels for purchasing beverages.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Coca-Cola logo, display panel, payment interface, and product selection area.
description_view_1: Side view with the Coca-Cola logo in white on a red background, no visible interactive components.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain red surface and black base, no visible branding or interactive features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with the Coca-Cola logo in white on red, no interactive components.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular display panel is located in the upper right section of the front face, featuring a digital or printed screen and illuminated area.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface is present below the display panel, including a card reader and possibly a bill acceptor, all grouped in the upper right section.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: A vertical row of individual product selection buttons is visible below the payment interface, each labeled for different beverage options.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A rectangular product retrieval slot is located in the lower section of the front face, likely with a flap or door for accessing purchased items.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Large Coca-Cola logo in white on the front and both sides, with a red background and additional branding graphics, making the machine highly recognizable.
